title: 20 LUXURY 3 PLY WHITE PAPER NAPKINS - 33cm x 33cm Ideal for weddings, christenings, parties, bbq's etc
features: Pack of 20 – Perfect for Any Gathering Large 33cm Size – Ideal for Lunches, Dinners & Events Ultra-Soft 3-Ply Thickness – Maximum Comfort & Absorbency Elegant Embossed Design – Sophisticated Look, Functional Texture Disposable & Eco-Friendly – Easy Cleanup Without the Guilt
description: Premium 3-Ply Paper Napkins – 33cm Square | Pack of 20 | Elegant, Soft & Absorbent Elevate your dining experience with PPS Premium 3-Ply Paper Napkins – the perfect blend of style, strength, and softness. Whether you're hosting a party, planning a wedding, or setting a stylish table for everyday use, these 33cm square napkins add a touch of class to any occasion. Pack of 20 – Perfect for Any Gathering Large 33cm Size – Ideal for Lunches, Dinners & Events Ultra-Soft 3-Ply Thickness – Maximum Comfort & Absorbency Elegant Embossed Design – Sophisticated Look, Functional Texture Disposable & Eco-Friendly – Easy Cleanup Without the Guilt Crafted for convenience and designed to impress, these high-quality napkins are a must-have for homes, restaurants, caterers, and event planners. Check storefront 'Vareedu' for qty discounts
